actionUnits.condition: Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered on Floor's socket (component fileID likely 515040908) with an Interactable whose transform.name matches the serialized 'correctPiece' name. IfPuzzle (MonoBehaviour fileID 515040909, script guid a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b) should invoke linkedIfManager.correctPiece(). Note: In the scene meta, correctPiece = 0 and linkedIfManager = 0, so these must be assigned to avoid NullReferenceException.

Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered on Floor's socket (component fileID likely 515040908) with an Interactable whose transform.name does NOT match 'correctPiece'. IfPuzzle (fileID 515040909) should not call linkedIfManager.correctPiece().

Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectExited on Floor's socket (component fileID likely 515040908), indicating a piece was removed. IfPuzzle (fileID 515040909) should invoke linkedIfManager.removedPiece(). Note: linkedIfManager is currently unassigned (0) in scene meta.
